<!-- Chart CH-MAG-08 PARLIAMENT, role-based (themeable) -->

## PARLIAMENT chart (CH-MAG-08)

Render as SVG (or equivalent) on a 960x540 px canvas.
Colors are ROLES, not hex: resolve each role against the active design
language token block (a DL-xx block pasted next to this one). A role
chain like `benchmark -> muted` means use the first role the palette
defines.

### AI metadata (for agent routing)
```json
{
  "code": "CH-MAG-08",
  "ovp_version": "1.0",
  "intent": [
    "magnitude",
    "composition"
  ],
  "form": "semicircle of seats, one dot per unit, grouped contiguously",
  "data_required": "2-6 groups whose integer counts sum to a meaningful total of seats or slots",
  "family": "MAG",
  "alternatives": [
    "CH-PTW-01 (shares without the seat metaphor)",
    "CH-PTW-06 (percent of 100)"
  ],
  "see_instead": [
    {
      "when": "values are not countable seats",
      "use": "CH-PTW-01"
    },
    {
      "when": "a share of 100",
      "use": "CH-PTW-06"
    }
  ]
}
```

Use when:
- seats, slots, berths: integer allocations where each unit matters
- majority questions: who crosses the middle line

Do NOT use when:
- non-integer measures
- totals above ~200 (dots become texture)

### Input data shape
```json
{
  "title": "action title with a number",
  "source": "bottom-left always",
  "unit": "what a seat is",
  "parties": "[{name, seats}], display order"
}
```

### Exact layout (px on the canvas, follow literally)
```json
{
  "canvas": {
    "width": 960,
    "height": 540
  },
  "layout": {
    "title": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 56,
      "y_with_eyebrow": 88,
      "size": 24
    },
    "kicker": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 28,
      "w": 24,
      "h": 4
    },
    "eyebrow": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 52,
      "size": 11,
      "letter_spacing": 2
    },
    "source": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 516,
      "size": 11
    },
    "cx": 430,
    "cy": 400,
    "r_inner": 90,
    "r_outer": 210,
    "seat_r": 7,
    "legend_x": 700,
    "legend_y": 200,
    "legend_label": {
      "size": 12
    },
    "total_size": 28
  }
}
```

### Rules
- deterministic layout: rows by capacity, seats filled left to right by angle
- groups contiguous, colored by the monochrome primary ramp
- the total printed in the hemicycle center

### Never do this
- rainbow party palettes
- non-integer seat counts
- using it for shares that are not allocations

### QA before delivering
- [ ] seats integer and contiguous
- [ ] total printed
- [ ] <= 6 groups
- [ ] source present

### Color roles

| Element | Role chain |
|---|---|
| background | background |
| legend | body |
| total | ink |
| title | ink |
| source | body |

### Fonts

Title uses the token block's `display` font; everything else uses
`body`. Weight 600 only on highlighted items.
